name: Beef Lo Mein with Bean Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the noodles and cook for 1 minute after they reach a second boil. Drain and rinse with cold water. Drain thoroughly.
2. Prepare the beef marinade: Mix together 1/2 tbsp soy sauce, 2 tsp rice wine or dry sherry, 1/2 tsp sugar, 1/2 tbsp cornstarch, 1 tsp sesame oil.
3. Add the beef strips to the marinade and let stand for 15 minutes.
4. In a wok, heat 2 tablespoons of peanut oil over high heat. Add ginger and garlic; sauté until fragrant.
5. Increase the heat to high and add the beef. Stir-fry until browned, about 2 minutes. Remove and set aside.
6. Reduce heat to medium and add the remaining peanut oil. Add the rest of the ginger, garlic, and salt.
7. Pour in the sauce mixture (oyster sauce, dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, chicken broth, sesame oil, sugar, white pepper). Stir and bring to a boil.
8. Add the noodles and toss with the sauce. Add the bean sprouts and stir-fry until coated.
9. Return the beef to the wok and mix well.
